scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Action && npm install && cd ../Build && npm install && cd ../Worker && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:action && npm run build:client && npm run build:worker
scripts.test: cd Action && npm test && cd ../Worker && npm test && cd ../Build && npm test
scripts.lint: cd Build && npm run lint && cd ../Worker && npm run lint
scripts.make-pretty: cd Build && npm run make-pretty && cd ../Worker && npm run make-pretty
